mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: proteinuria, splenomegaly, neurological symptoms (restlessness, shuffling gait, myopathy, axonal degeneration)
renal involvement (proteinuria, acute kidney injury), angiodysplasia (livedo reticularis, hemangiomatosis), cardiac involvement (pulmonary arterial hypertension, arrhythmias)
skeletal dysplasia (abnormal hip and shoulder morphology, short stature), corneal clouding, respiratory insufficiency
coarsening of facial features, mental deterioration, progressive pulmonary function impairment, somatic sensory dysfunction
skin fragility, easy bruising, arterial rupture (podagra, peripheral edema), joint hypermobility
epilepsy, intellectual disability, skin lesions (acanthosis nigricans, hypopigmented macules), eye findings (retinal hamartomas, chorioretinitis)
mental retardation, musculoskeletal problems (long thorax, webbing of the neck), vascular complications (arterial occlusion, embolisms)
tall stature, disproportionality, pectus excavatum or carinatum, scoliosis, ectopic lentis
